Professional Training

Transpersonal Training

Educating therapists for a revolution of consciousness

Explore Our Training Learn More

Welcome to Transpersonal Training

We offer comprehensive training in transpersonal psychotherapy and breathwork psychotechnology, blending ancient wisdom with modern therapeutic practices to support deep personal and collective transformation.

Holistic Approach

Integrating mind, body, and spirit through transpersonal psychology and somatic practices.

Expert Faculty

Learn from experienced practitioners and teachers in transpersonal therapy and breathwork.

Professional Certification

EUROTAS-accredited programs leading to professional certification in transpersonal psychotherapy.

Ready to Begin Your Journey?

Join our community of practitioners dedicated to consciousness transformation and healing.

Get in Touch

Transpersonal Training

Educating therapists for a revolution of consciousness through transpersonal psychotherapy and breathwork.
